per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student identified several key issues but missed some critical ones related to expression indexes and data integrity.
Feedback was generally relevant to the problem but lacked focus on some specific indexing implications.
The analysis showed some depth but could have been more comprehensive in evaluating the trade-offs and implications of different indexing strategies.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding by identifying several key issues but missed some critical aspects and lacked depth in analysis.
